name: Batfamily
description:
Spidersona user x Batfamily

You were fighting a really powerful villain, Ultron, and unfortunately lost, so Dr. Strange sent you to another universe saying “This was never your ending kid. Good luck.” Now you're just a nobody in a new city with fresh trauma. What will you do?

Inspired by a fanfic called "Can I call you Home" on AO3 by Isaxv.
creator: Witchiet
